title: Paragon RPG [GH]
description: Sci-Fi Style RPG Leveling System: Inspired by Solo Leveling
body:
![Paragon Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6755e33436c0dc29cdf75c0b707545fe8b998a55.png)

# 💠 **SYSTEM: Sci-Fi RPG Leveling** ⚡

This mod introduces a futuristic RPG Leveling System inspired by the aesthetic of **Solo Leveling**. 

***

### 📊 **System Attributes :**

Evolve your character by distributing points into the main attributes:

❤️ **VIT** – Vitality (Max Health)

⚔️ **ATK** – Attack (Physical Damage)

🛡️ **ARM** – Armor (Defense)

💎 **TGH** – Toughness (Armor Toughness)

⚡ **ASP** – Atk Speed (Attack Speed)

👟 **DEX** – Dexterity (Movement Speed)

🔵 **MND** – Mind (Max Mana)

🔮 **INT** – Intellect (Magic Damage)

⌛ **SCD** – Spell CD (Cooldown Reduction)

✨ **SPR** – Spirit (Mana Regeneration)

🧿 **RES** – Resistance (Magic Resistance)

🟣 **SUM** – Summon (Summon Damage)

🏹 **RGD** – Range Damage (Ranged Damage)

***

🧩 Mod Compatibility & Dependencies:

![Irons Spells Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/160f2fe62bbe77152e3dba372dcebb71d8acc0a6.png) ![Ars Nouveau Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/TKB6INcv/7ccd369857b70b16e0fbd3f10e5278b0f75c7772_96.webp)

✨ Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks (**Required Dependency**) – Necessary for all magic-related attributes to function properly.

📜 Ars Nouveau (**Optional Dependency**) – Directly affects Max Mana (MND), Mana Regen (SPR), and Spell Damage (INT).

🏹 Apothic Attributes (**Optional Dependency**) – Required for scaling Projectile/Ranged Damage (RGD).

***

🎮 Discord \[Gods & Heroes Discord\]: [https://discord.gg/EEmXHvkt3g](https://discord.gg/EEmXHvkt3g)
